ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age_at_diagnosis" REAL /* Age of the patient at diagnosis */,
  "tumor_size" INTEGER /* Size of the tumor */,
  "tumor_stage" INTEGER /* Stage of the tumor */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "menopausal_status" TEXT /* Menopausal status of the patient */,
  "family_history" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has a family history of breast cancer */,
  "genetic_testing_done" INTEGER /* Whether genetic testing has been done for the patient */,
  "date_of_diagnosis" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer type */,
  "subtypes" TEXT /* Subtypes of the cancer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "type_of_breast_surgery" TEXT /* Type of breast surgery performed */,
  "chemotherapy" INTEGER /* Chemotherapy administered */,
  "radio_therapy" INTEGER /* Radio therapy administered */,
  "hormone_therapy" INTEGER /* Hormone therapy administered */,
  "targeted_therapy" INTEGER /* Targeted therapy administered */,
  "immunotherapy" INTEGER /* Immunotherapy administered */,
  "treatment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatments" (
  "patient_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-treatment relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_outcomes" (
  "survival_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "overall_survival_months" REAL /* Overall survival months */,
  "death_from_cancer" TEXT /* Death from cancer (Living or Died of Disease) */,
  "disease_free_survival_months" REAL /* Disease-free survival months */,
  "distant_metastasis_free_survival_months" REAL /* Distant metastasis-free survival months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_stages" (
  "cancer_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer stage */,
  "cancer_stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer stage */,
  "tumor_size_range" TEXT /* Tumor size range for the cancer stage */,
  "lymph_node_involvement" TEXT /* Lymph node involvement for the cancer stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lymph_nodes" (
  "lymph_node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lymph node */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "lymph_nodes_examined_positive" INTEGER /* Number of lymph nodes examined positive */,
  "lymph_nodes_examined_total" INTEGER /* Total number of lymph nodes examined */,
  "lymph_node_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of positive lymph nodes to total lymph nodes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lymph_node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lymph_nodes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "mutation_count" INTEGER /* Number of mutations */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene mutated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nottingham_prognostic_indexes" (
  "nottingham_prognostic_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nottingham prognostic index */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "nottingham_prognostic_index" REAL /* Nottingham prognostic index value */,
  "prognostic_group" TEXT /* Prognostic group based on the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nottingham_prognostic_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nottingham_prognostic_indexes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oncotree_codes" (
  "oncotree_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each oncotree code */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "oncotree_code" TEXT /* Oncotree code */,
  "oncotree_code_description" TEXT /* Description of the oncotree code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oncotree_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oncotree_codes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_project_participants" (
  "research_project_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project participant */,
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., case, control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_project_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_project_participants_research_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("research_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_project_participants_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_project_user_access" (
  "research_project_user_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project user access */,
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_project_user_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_project_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_project_user_access_research_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("research_project_id")
)
